symptoms: // initProgressOnce is used to ensure init progress once to avoid data race.
failure_signature: // initProgressOnce is used to ensure init progress once to avoid data race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: lightning: support inject external storage when as library.
fix_pattern: lightning: support inject external storage when as library

evidence: evidence: // initProgressOnce is used to ensure init progress once to avoid data race.
